channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Israel kills three Palestinians in separate Gaza strikes
item.description: Two Palestinians were killed in separate strikes in southern Gaza on Monday, according to officials at Nasser hospital.

item.title: Hezbollah rejects Lebanon’s direct negotiations with Israel
item.description: Hezbollah leader Naim Qassem has urged Lebanon to cancel a planned Washington meeting with Israeli representatives.

item.title: Trump says Iran wants ‘peace deal’ but insists on ‘no nukes’
item.description: Donald Trump says Iran wants to make a peace deal “very badly” after talks in Islamabad ended without agreement.

item.title: Starmer announces talks to address the Strait of Hormuz crisis
item.description: Starmer has announced talks to be held this week and co-hosted with France, aiming at diplomatic end to the war on Iran

item.title: EU: No peace possible while “Lebanon is in flames”
item.description: Von der Leyen warns Hormuz closure and Israeli strikes on Lebanon threaten regional stability.

item.title: What are the pros and cons of Trump’s Iranian naval blockade?
item.description: What does Donald Trump’s naval blockade of Iranian ports look like and can it achieve what the US president wants?

item.title: Bahrain summons Iraqi envoy as pro-Iranian attacks persist in Gulf
item.description: Move reflects regional alarm over attacks by pro-Iranian groups based in Iraq, which continue despite ceasefire.

item.title: Iran releases assets of women’s football captain in Australia asylum row
item.description: Zahra Ghanbari, one of the six players who sought asylum in Australia, reversed her decision and returned to Iran.

item.title: BBC joins paramedics on duty in Lebanon after Israeli strikes
item.description: BBC Middle East correspondent Hugo Bachega joins paramedics on duty in Nabatieh - a city that was once vibrant, but is now abandoned.

item.title: Iran carried out highest number of executions in decades
item.description: Organisations warn many more people could be executed in the wake of the anti-government protests which swept Iran earlier this year.
